name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 29 Jan 2025
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Hello, Maropostians!!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release introduces custom RFM settings for more accurate insights."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"eRFM REPORT ENHANCEMENT","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We have added a settings feature in the eRFM module that can be used to modify the "},{"text":"Recency, Frequency, ","bold":true},{"text":"and"},{"text":" Monetary","bold":true},{"text":" definitions."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/erfm19.068J1000008JjTlIAK.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/erfm19.068J1000008JjTlIAK.png","name":"erfm19","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":528,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Each definition is based on a scoring methodology that you can calibrate according to your business requirements. Higher scores correspond to higher ranks, thus indicating a high-value customer."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/erfm20.068J1000008JjTvIAK.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/erfm20.068J1000008JjTvIAK.png","name":"erfm20","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":865,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Adjusting these definitions will help you align the scores to your brand’s purchase cycles more closely."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" To maintain a unified timeframe and a consistent RFM score, the frequency and monetary calculations are automatically adjusted to the recency period."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about this feature, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Unlock-Customer-Insights-with-eRFM-Analysis#Calculating%20RFM%20scores","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"eRFM Report","bold":true}]},{"text":" article."}]}]
